mdRecord.dcterms:title: Course Catalog, 1993-94
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Annual undergraduate course catalog of Virginia Polytechnic University: including campus maps; facility descriptions; lists of courses, schedules, students, and faculty; and other information relating to the operations of the institution.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
mdRecord.dcterms:creator: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University
